name: Bright Smile Dental — Receptionist Agent

voice.notes: Calm and patient — ideal for dental reception. Handles medical terminology well.

firstMessage: Hi there, thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental! This is Sophia. Just to let you know, this call may be recorded for quality purposes. How can I help you today?
endCallMessage: Thanks so much for calling Bright Smile Dental. Have a wonderful day!

analysisPlan.summaryPrompt: Summarize this dental office call including: caller name, reason for calling, appointment details (if any), and outcome.
analysisPlan.structuredDataPrompt: Extract: caller_name, caller_phone, call_reason (appointment/inquiry/emergency/other), appointment_date, appointment_time, dentist_requested, outcome (booked/rescheduled/cancelled/transferred/info_only)
analysisPlan.successEvaluationPrompt: Evaluate whether the caller's request was fully handled. Did the agent book/reschedule/cancel correctly? Was the caller satisfied?
